name: Zosano Pharma Corp. Registered
summary: Zosano Pharma Corporation is a pharmaceutical company that develops and commercializes products utilizing its proprietary transdermal microneedle system to deliver therapeutics. The company's lead product candidate is Qtrypta (zolmitriptan transdermal microneedle system) for the acute treatment of migraine. Zosano Pharma is headquartered in Fremont, California.
